meta.summary: Browser-based HiGlass server for interactive visualization of Hi-C contact maps and other tiled genomic tracks.
meta.description: Browser-based HiGlass server for interactive visualization of Hi-C contact maps and other tiled genomic tracks.

test: higlass --version | grep -F 'higlass-docker 0.10.4' && higlass -- --version | grep -F 'higlass-docker 0.10.4' && higlass --version | grep -F 'SERVER_VERSION: 1.14.8' && higlass --version | grep -F 'LIBRARY_VERSION: 1.11.4'

tmp="$(mktemp -d /tmp/taf-higlass-smoke.XXXXXX)" && (higlass --host-port 8888 > "$tmp/higlass.log" 2>&1 & pid="$!"; ok=0; for i in $(seq 1 45); do if curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1/api/v1/tilesets/ | grep -F '"count"' >/dev/null; then ok=1; break; fi; sleep 1; done; kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; grep -F 'http://127.0.0.1:8888/' "$tmp/higlass.log" >/dev/null; test "$ok" -eq 1)

upstream.name: HiGlass Docker
upstream.citation: Kerpedjiev et al. 2018. HiGlass: web-based visual exploration and analysis of genome interaction maps.

meta.summary: Browser-based HiGlass server for interactive visualization of Hi-C contact maps and other tiled genomic tracks.
meta.description: Browser-based HiGlass server for interactive visualization of Hi-C contact maps and other tiled genomic tracks.

test: higlass --version | grep -F 'higlass 2.3.4' && higlass -- --version | grep -F 'higlass 2.3.4' && higlass --version | grep -F 'HIGLASS_VERSION: 2.3.4' && higlass --version | grep -F 'HIGLASS_COMMIT: 5600c33ba6431b1ca53db35be31838115673c843' && higlass --version | grep -F 'FRONTEND_BUILD: taffish-vite-viewer' && higlass --version | grep -F 'FRONTEND_SOURCE: higlass v2.3.4' && higlass --version | grep -F 'HIGLASS_DOCKER_SCAFFOLD_VERSION: 0.10.5' && higlass --version | grep -F 'SERVER_VERSION: 1.14.8' && higlass --version | grep -F 'SERVER_COMMIT: cbfe79fe3ae0e844b4c0c78142a83733c8cc66a2' && higlass --version | grep -F 'NUMBA_VERSION: 0.56.4' && higlass --version | grep -F 'LLVMLITE_VERSION: 0.39.1' && higlass --version | grep -F 'PANDAS_VERSION: 1.5.3' && higlass --version | grep -F 'CLODIUS_VERSION: 0.19.0'
python -c 'import clodius, cooler, pandas, numba; print("ok")' | grep -Fx ok

tmp="$(mktemp -d /tmp/taf-higlass-smoke.XXXXXX)" && (higlass --host-port 8888 --startup-timeout 90 --log-file "$tmp/supervisord.log" > "$tmp/higlass.log" 2>&1 & pid="$!"; ok=0; for i in $(seq 1 90); do if grep -F 'HiGlass is ready.' "$tmp/higlass.log" >/dev/null 2>&1 && curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1/api/v1/tilesets/ 2>/dev/null | grep -F '"count"' >/dev/null && curl -fsS 'http://127.0.0.1/api/v1/viewconfs/?d=default' 2>/dev/null | grep -F '"views"' >/dev/null && curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1/app 2>/dev/null | grep -F 'TAFFISH HiGlass' >/dev/null; then ok=1; break; fi; sleep 1; done; kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; grep -F 'HiGlass is ready.' "$tmp/higlass.log" >/dev/null; grep -F 'http://127.0.0.1:8888/app' "$tmp/higlass.log" >/dev/null; test "$ok" -eq 1)
